title: Audit seed-100 v2 host/core proposal artifacts and finalize RISK-04 severe gate
description: Use existing l20 Beauty/Steam seed-100 kernel_version=v2 checkpoints exposing text_side_builder.p1; generate deterministic train-only proposal records over the fixed 4000-row sample and bind the preflight to the popularity-stratified RISK-04 banks.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the dated audit validates both p1 vectors, all twelve proposal manifests and the train-only preflight THEN the Steam C60 mean-gate drop is computed once against clean; WHEN the fixed 20% threshold passes THEN a new immutable RISK-04 PASS bundle and RISK-05 preregistration may be emitted; HARD STOP on tensor substitution, hash mismatch, validation/test input, seed change, overwrite, or training before RISK-05.
review_initial_requirements: Review checkpoint state_dict nesting, padding-slot semantics, p1 length/item mapping, bank/proposal/preflight hashes, severe threshold, and immutable dated roots.
review_regression_requirements: Re-run focused adapter tests and validate the remote RISK-04/RISK-05 markers; confirm no GPU training process started and stale metadata-only rebuild is excluded.
